revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:バラモン, en:Brahmin, simple:Brahmin); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/3773170 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) Peehyoro Acalaと申します。
え、私の聞いた話だと、婆羅門(バラモン)は、 ブラーフマナ (ब्राह्मण)の音写 とのことなんですが....。
ブラーフマナは、ブラフマンの派生形容詞転じて名詞で「ブラフマンに属する(階級)」 という意味。ブラフマンそのものではないそうです。
で、「ブラフミン」というのも、私は聞いた事が無いんですが、 どういう素性の言葉なんでしょうか？ 原綴とか示して頂けると、少しは調べられるかもしれないんですが....。[[利用者:Peehyoro Acala|Peehyoro Acala]] 15:16 2003年7月3日 (UTC) *ありがとう。バラモンは司祭カーストの意味だと言うことですね? 根本原理のブラフマンの意味は記事から消します。 :ブラフミンの発音(つづり)の由来は知りません。[http://www.google.com/search?num=100&hl=ja&ie=UTF-8&oe=UTF-8&as_qdr=all&q=%E3%82%AB%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88+%E3%83%96%E3%83%A9%E3%83%95%E3%83%9F%E3%83%B3&btnG=Google+%E6%A4%9C%E7%B4%A2&lr= グーグル検索(カースト ブラフミン)]、[http://www.google.com/search?num=100&hl=ja&ie=UTF-8&oe=UTF-8&as_qdr=all&q=brahmin+caste&btnG=Google+%E6%A4%9C%E7%B4%A2&lr= グーグル検索(brahmin caste)]と言うことで使われているというのは間違いないです。 :ブラフミンは、ブラフマンとも、ブラーフマナとも言うのは知っていました。ただ、ブラーフマナは書物でヴェーダの一部の祭儀書でもあり、ブラフマンは根本原理の意味もあるので意味が重複してしまいます。それで、ブラフミンを使うと意味が重複しなくて便利だなあと思います。 :ただ、知合いのインド人は「ブラフマン」とカーストの名前を呼んでいるようです。近くの野菜屋さんの家族はブラフマンです。おかげでしばらく、ブラフマーが根本原理の呼び名かと勘違いしてました。必然的に、人格神ブラフマーが別に存在しているのは忘れていました。実際に人格神ブラフマーを祭っている寺院に遭遇したことがないのでそう勘違いしたのでしょう。 :--[[利用者:Setu|Setu]] 19:56 2003年7月3日 (UTC) Peehyoro Acalaでございます。
ふむむむ、ブラーフマナが、もともと形容詞というのが問題みたいですね。 もともと「ブラフマンに属する階級」、「ブラフマンに属する祭儀書」だったのが、 「階級」「祭儀書」の方を省略して呼んでいるうちに紛らわしくなったと（笑）。
もしかしたら、お知り合いのインド人さんの仰るカーストのブラフマンや人名のブラフマンも、 案外、正式な形の何かが脱落した口語形なのかもしれません。[[利用者:Peehyoro Acala|Peehyoro Acala]] 10:03 2003年7月5日 (UTC) == [[ブラフミン]]との統合について == ブラフミンは英語からのカタカナ表記、バラモンは梵語の音写のカタカナ表記のようです。日本語としての歴史はバラモンの方が長いようなので、バラモンに統合したいところですがいかがでしょうか。[[利用者:Ligar|Ligar]] 2005年1月7日 (金) 00:57 (UTC) :特にご意見がなかったので、統合せず、しばらくはこのままの状態でおきたいと思います。[[利用者:Ligar|Ligar]] 2005年1月22日 (土) 05:05 (UTC) **（賛成）統合に賛成します。（--12/2,220.99.231.195） ***（対処）統合してみました。適宜修正して下さい。--[[利用者:Kstigarbha|Kstigarbha]] 2005年12月5日 (月) 11:07 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1313143275 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{Skip to talk}} {{Contentious topics/talk notice|topic=ipa}} {{Talk header}} {{Old prod|nom=Ankush 89|nomdate=10 April 2015|nomreason=This article does not meet Wikipedia Quality Standards and is just favoured and biased as an attempt to promote the fame of this caste|con=Gene93k|condate=10 April 2015|conreason=Deletion is too controversial for PROD. Requires discussion at AfD.}} {{Old peer review|archive=1}} {{WikiProject banner shell|class=B|vital=yes|1= {{WikiProject India|importance=High|assess-date=September 2024}} {{WikiProject Hinduism|importance = Top}} {{WikiProject Indian caste system|importance=Top}} {{WikiProject Sociology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Ethnic groups|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Guild of Copy Editors|user=Jack Greenmaven |date=May 10, 2012 }} }} {{Expert-talk}} {{User:MiszaBot/config |archiveheader = {{aan}} |maxarchivesize = 100K |counter = 4 |minthreadsleft = 3 |algo = old(90d) |archive = Talk:Brahmin/Archive %(counter)d }} == Genetic heredity == The article as it stands reads as if there is no basis to the brahmins as an endogamous caste group, which is clearly nonsense. All genetic analyses show that brahmins show significantly more proximity to each other than to regional and other caste groups. The article ought to be revised to reflect this point. If a Tamil brahmin is closer to a Punjabi brahmin than a Punjabi brahmin is to a Punjabi khatri, then this clearly shows that brahmins are a genetic endogamous group and that the history of India reflects that brahmins had a hereditary status and were held separate from people who merely learned or practised some portion of a religious praxis, or held allegiance to a religious corpus. Indeed, genetic tests connnect brahmins together and give the lie to the claim that being a brahmin was merely a vocational choice within the framework of Indian culture. The article is misleading and seems to imply that there is no such thing as an inherited brahmin caste genetic heritage, when this is demonstrably false. [[User:Zubedar|Zubedar]] ([[User talk:Zubedar|talk]]) 00:44, 21 July 2024 (UTC) :Please note that we don't mention genetics in caste articles as per [[WP:CONSENSUS]]! [[User:Ekdalian|Ekdalian]] ([[User talk:Ekdalian|talk]]) 05:51, 21 July 2024 (UTC) :This is something I second. And this is seen clearly in major papers like Narasimhan et al 2019. :There is shared culture between Brahmins too. :People don't seem to fully understand the fact that "ethnic identity" in India is a blend of various factors and not solely dependent on the langauge you speak; as people/groups migrated throughout history and picked up some local customs/tongues while retaining their original culture. :This current article has been presented in a way it is reducing the cultural, communal and overall sense of identity of Brahmins to just a "caste". We don't see this being done for other groups for example on articles about Jat, Khatri, Gurjar so I don't see why the same is applied for Brahmins, when Brahmins have clear cut genealogies, scriptural records and historic recounts connecting and mentioning Brahmins as a group with common origins and cultural descent. [[User:Temporary 1010|Temporary 1010]] ([[User talk:Temporary 1010|talk]]) 15:07, 21 January 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 15 October 2024 == {{edit extended-protected|Brahmin|answered=yes}} Branhminism has been used to oppress people from other caste group. [[Special:Contributions/116.75.98.65|116.75.98.65]] ([[User talk:116.75.98.65|talk]]) 16:48, 15 October 2024 (UTC) :{{Not done}}: please provide [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable sources]] that support the change you want to be made. [[User:Bowler the Carmine|Bowler the Carmine]] | [[User talk:Bowler the Carmine|talk]] 17:45, 15 October 2024 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 24 September 2025 == {{Edit extended-protected|Brahmin|answered=yes}} What we call Brahmins today is not necessarily what they were centuries ago. Ancient texts and power structures may have been rewritten to elevate their image, but in reality, they were often scribes, priests, and functionaries serving under kings—not rulers themselves. Their power came from controlling rituals and knowledge, not from land or armies. The Chola Empire, which valued warriors, administrators, and temple-builders, reportedly turned against certain Brahmin groups who overstepped their role. Conspiracy theorists argue that these Brahmins manipulated religion for personal gain, misusing rituals to sway rulers. When this became obvious, they were chased, punished, or reduced in status, especially in Tamil regions. The later rewriting of history by northern dynasties and colonial powers may have “upgraded” the Brahmin caste to appear like the eternal elite, masking their older role as temple workers, advisors, and accountants for royal families. Some even say the narrative of Brahmin supremacy is the biggest propaganda project of Indian history—a survival tactic after being sidelined by Tamil kings like the Cholas. ⚡ In short: the conspiracy theory is that Brahmins were never true rulers but royal workers whose status was inflated later—and the Cholas, being sharp rulers, saw through their tricks and put them back in their place. [[Special:Contributions/2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2|2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2]] ([[User talk:2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2|talk]]) 10:50, 24 September 2025 (UTC) :{{not done}}''':''' this is an AI-generated conspiracy theory. [[User:NotAGenious|NotAGenious]] ([[User talk:NotAGenious|talk]]) 13:30, 24 September 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Simple English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4412200 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) Hello bro's, who ever created this page "The Brahmins developed in the Aryan society by how powerful the people in this caste were." can u justify this statement by any realtime example. For Eg: does any Brahmin ever had goen in military or scarified his life for any one ha?.you people just go to teacher, doctor, scholar, or religious person. The how come this happen ha?. And "The Brahmins' society grew into the Aryan society around 1600 BC." can you give any proof for this statement and what is base that u are writting this with out any knowledge ha? And "Brahmins eat fish but they do not eat any other meat", eating fish itself is an non-veg and you are telling that you are veg ha?. do you the real meaning of Veg, the people who only eat the food that we get from Earth. And you are all eating Dairy products which made from milk, fishs and you are telling yourself as a Veg, just think ok... So can please edit that contents or should show any proof which show that is wrong ha?.. [[User:Nadarsatishkumar|GentalMan]] ([[User talk:Nadarsatishkumar|talk]]) 06:58, 16 May 2013 (UTC)

revision.comment: I guess I am immediately moving more things than I thought with this template. But hope this goes well. My bot uses a different named header template so we are using it
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/3773170 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) Peehyoro Acalaと申します。
え、私の聞いた話だと、婆羅門(バラモン)は、 ブラーフマナ (ब्राह्मण)の音写 とのことなんですが....。
ブラーフマナは、ブラフマンの派生形容詞転じて名詞で「ブラフマンに属する(階級)」 という意味。ブラフマンそのものではないそうです。
で、「ブラフミン」というのも、私は聞いた事が無いんですが、 どういう素性の言葉なんでしょうか？ 原綴とか示して頂けると、少しは調べられるかもしれないんですが....。[[利用者:Peehyoro Acala|Peehyoro Acala]] 15:16 2003年7月3日 (UTC) *ありがとう。バラモンは司祭カーストの意味だと言うことですね? 根本原理のブラフマンの意味は記事から消します。 :ブラフミンの発音(つづり)の由来は知りません。[http://www.google.com/search?num=100&hl=ja&ie=UTF-8&oe=UTF-8&as_qdr=all&q=%E3%82%AB%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88+%E3%83%96%E3%83%A9%E3%83%95%E3%83%9F%E3%83%B3&btnG=Google+%E6%A4%9C%E7%B4%A2&lr= グーグル検索(カースト ブラフミン)]、[http://www.google.com/search?num=100&hl=ja&ie=UTF-8&oe=UTF-8&as_qdr=all&q=brahmin+caste&btnG=Google+%E6%A4%9C%E7%B4%A2&lr= グーグル検索(brahmin caste)]と言うことで使われているというのは間違いないです。 :ブラフミンは、ブラフマンとも、ブラーフマナとも言うのは知っていました。ただ、ブラーフマナは書物でヴェーダの一部の祭儀書でもあり、ブラフマンは根本原理の意味もあるので意味が重複してしまいます。それで、ブラフミンを使うと意味が重複しなくて便利だなあと思います。 :ただ、知合いのインド人は「ブラフマン」とカーストの名前を呼んでいるようです。近くの野菜屋さんの家族はブラフマンです。おかげでしばらく、ブラフマーが根本原理の呼び名かと勘違いしてました。必然的に、人格神ブラフマーが別に存在しているのは忘れていました。実際に人格神ブラフマーを祭っている寺院に遭遇したことがないのでそう勘違いしたのでしょう。 :--[[利用者:Setu|Setu]] 19:56 2003年7月3日 (UTC) Peehyoro Acalaでございます。
ふむむむ、ブラーフマナが、もともと形容詞というのが問題みたいですね。 もともと「ブラフマンに属する階級」、「ブラフマンに属する祭儀書」だったのが、 「階級」「祭儀書」の方を省略して呼んでいるうちに紛らわしくなったと（笑）。
もしかしたら、お知り合いのインド人さんの仰るカーストのブラフマンや人名のブラフマンも、 案外、正式な形の何かが脱落した口語形なのかもしれません。[[利用者:Peehyoro Acala|Peehyoro Acala]] 10:03 2003年7月5日 (UTC) == [[ブラフミン]]との統合について == ブラフミンは英語からのカタカナ表記、バラモンは梵語の音写のカタカナ表記のようです。日本語としての歴史はバラモンの方が長いようなので、バラモンに統合したいところですがいかがでしょうか。[[利用者:Ligar|Ligar]] 2005年1月7日 (金) 00:57 (UTC) :特にご意見がなかったので、統合せず、しばらくはこのままの状態でおきたいと思います。[[利用者:Ligar|Ligar]] 2005年1月22日 (土) 05:05 (UTC) **（賛成）統合に賛成します。（--12/2,220.99.231.195） ***（対処）統合してみました。適宜修正して下さい。--[[利用者:Kstigarbha|Kstigarbha]] 2005年12月5日 (月) 11:07 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1313143275 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{Skip to talk}} {{Contentious topics/talk notice|topic=ipa}} {{Talk page header}} {{Old prod|nom=Ankush 89|nomdate=10 April 2015|nomreason=This article does not meet Wikipedia Quality Standards and is just favoured and biased as an attempt to promote the fame of this caste|con=Gene93k|condate=10 April 2015|conreason=Deletion is too controversial for PROD. Requires discussion at AfD.}} {{Old peer review|archive=1}} {{WikiProject banner shell|class=B|vital=yes|1= {{WikiProject India|importance=High|assess-date=September 2024}} {{WikiProject Hinduism|importance = Top}} {{WikiProject Indian caste system|importance=Top}} {{WikiProject Sociology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Ethnic groups|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Guild of Copy Editors|user=Jack Greenmaven |date=May 10, 2012 }} }} {{Expert-talk}} {{User:MiszaBot/config |archiveheader = {{aan}} |maxarchivesize = 100K |counter = 4 |minthreadsleft = 3 |algo = old(90d) |archive = Talk:Brahmin/Archive %(counter)d }} == Genetic heredity == The article as it stands reads as if there is no basis to the brahmins as an endogamous caste group, which is clearly nonsense. All genetic analyses show that brahmins show significantly more proximity to each other than to regional and other caste groups. The article ought to be revised to reflect this point. If a Tamil brahmin is closer to a Punjabi brahmin than a Punjabi brahmin is to a Punjabi khatri, then this clearly shows that brahmins are a genetic endogamous group and that the history of India reflects that brahmins had a hereditary status and were held separate from people who merely learned or practised some portion of a religious praxis, or held allegiance to a religious corpus. Indeed, genetic tests connnect brahmins together and give the lie to the claim that being a brahmin was merely a vocational choice within the framework of Indian culture. The article is misleading and seems to imply that there is no such thing as an inherited brahmin caste genetic heritage, when this is demonstrably false. [[User:Zubedar|Zubedar]] ([[User talk:Zubedar|talk]]) 00:44, 21 July 2024 (UTC) :Please note that we don't mention genetics in caste articles as per [[WP:CONSENSUS]]! [[User:Ekdalian|Ekdalian]] ([[User talk:Ekdalian|talk]]) 05:51, 21 July 2024 (UTC) :This is something I second. And this is seen clearly in major papers like Narasimhan et al 2019. :There is shared culture between Brahmins too. :People don't seem to fully understand the fact that "ethnic identity" in India is a blend of various factors and not solely dependent on the langauge you speak; as people/groups migrated throughout history and picked up some local customs/tongues while retaining their original culture. :This current article has been presented in a way it is reducing the cultural, communal and overall sense of identity of Brahmins to just a "caste". We don't see this being done for other groups for example on articles about Jat, Khatri, Gurjar so I don't see why the same is applied for Brahmins, when Brahmins have clear cut genealogies, scriptural records and historic recounts connecting and mentioning Brahmins as a group with common origins and cultural descent. [[User:Temporary 1010|Temporary 1010]] ([[User talk:Temporary 1010|talk]]) 15:07, 21 January 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 15 October 2024 == {{edit extended-protected|Brahmin|answered=yes}} Branhminism has been used to oppress people from other caste group. [[Special:Contributions/116.75.98.65|116.75.98.65]] ([[User talk:116.75.98.65|talk]]) 16:48, 15 October 2024 (UTC) :{{Not done}}: please provide [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable sources]] that support the change you want to be made. [[User:Bowler the Carmine|Bowler the Carmine]] | [[User talk:Bowler the Carmine|talk]] 17:45, 15 October 2024 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 24 September 2025 == {{Edit extended-protected|Brahmin|answered=yes}} What we call Brahmins today is not necessarily what they were centuries ago. Ancient texts and power structures may have been rewritten to elevate their image, but in reality, they were often scribes, priests, and functionaries serving under kings—not rulers themselves. Their power came from controlling rituals and knowledge, not from land or armies. The Chola Empire, which valued warriors, administrators, and temple-builders, reportedly turned against certain Brahmin groups who overstepped their role. Conspiracy theorists argue that these Brahmins manipulated religion for personal gain, misusing rituals to sway rulers. When this became obvious, they were chased, punished, or reduced in status, especially in Tamil regions. The later rewriting of history by northern dynasties and colonial powers may have “upgraded” the Brahmin caste to appear like the eternal elite, masking their older role as temple workers, advisors, and accountants for royal families. Some even say the narrative of Brahmin supremacy is the biggest propaganda project of Indian history—a survival tactic after being sidelined by Tamil kings like the Cholas. ⚡ In short: the conspiracy theory is that Brahmins were never true rulers but royal workers whose status was inflated later—and the Cholas, being sharp rulers, saw through their tricks and put them back in their place. [[Special:Contributions/2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2|2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2]] ([[User talk:2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2|talk]]) 10:50, 24 September 2025 (UTC) :{{not done}}''':''' this is an AI-generated conspiracy theory. [[User:NotAGenious|NotAGenious]] ([[User talk:NotAGenious|talk]]) 13:30, 24 September 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Simple English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4412200 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) Hello bro's, who ever created this page "The Brahmins developed in the Aryan society by how powerful the people in this caste were." can u justify this statement by any realtime example. For Eg: does any Brahmin ever had goen in military or scarified his life for any one ha?.you people just go to teacher, doctor, scholar, or religious person. The how come this happen ha?. And "The Brahmins' society grew into the Aryan society around 1600 BC." can you give any proof for this statement and what is base that u are writting this with out any knowledge ha? And "Brahmins eat fish but they do not eat any other meat", eating fish itself is an non-veg and you are telling that you are veg ha?. do you the real meaning of Veg, the people who only eat the food that we get from Earth. And you are all eating Dairy products which made from milk, fishs and you are telling yourself as a Veg, just think ok... So can please edit that contents or should show any proof which show that is wrong ha?.. [[User:Nadarsatishkumar|GentalMan]] ([[User talk:Nadarsatishkumar|talk]]) 06:58, 16 May 2013 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/3773170 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) Peehyoro Acalaと申します。
え、私の聞いた話だと、婆羅門(バラモン)は、 ブラーフマナ (ब्राह्मण)の音写 とのことなんですが....。
ブラーフマナは、ブラフマンの派生形容詞転じて名詞で「ブラフマンに属する(階級)」 という意味。ブラフマンそのものではないそうです。
で、「ブラフミン」というのも、私は聞いた事が無いんですが、 どういう素性の言葉なんでしょうか？ 原綴とか示して頂けると、少しは調べられるかもしれないんですが....。[[User:Peehyoro Acala|Peehyoro Acala]] 15:16 2003年7月3日 (UTC) *ありがとう。バラモンは司祭カーストの意味だと言うことですね? 根本原理のブラフマンの意味は記事から消します。 :ブラフミンの発音(つづり)の由来は知りません。[http://www.google.com/search?num=100&hl=ja&ie=UTF-8&oe=UTF-8&as_qdr=all&q=%E3%82%AB%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88+%E3%83%96%E3%83%A9%E3%83%95%E3%83%9F%E3%83%B3&btnG=Google+%E6%A4%9C%E7%B4%A2&lr= グーグル検索(カースト ブラフミン)]、[http://www.google.com/search?num=100&hl=ja&ie=UTF-8&oe=UTF-8&as_qdr=all&q=brahmin+caste&btnG=Google+%E6%A4%9C%E7%B4%A2&lr= グーグル検索(brahmin caste)]と言うことで使われているというのは間違いないです。 :ブラフミンは、ブラフマンとも、ブラーフマナとも言うのは知っていました。ただ、ブラーフマナは書物でヴェーダの一部の祭儀書でもあり、ブラフマンは根本原理の意味もあるので意味が重複してしまいます。それで、ブラフミンを使うと意味が重複しなくて便利だなあと思います。 :ただ、知合いのインド人は「ブラフマン」とカーストの名前を呼んでいるようです。近くの野菜屋さんの家族はブラフマンです。おかげでしばらく、ブラフマーが根本原理の呼び名かと勘違いしてました。必然的に、人格神ブラフマーが別に存在しているのは忘れていました。実際に人格神ブラフマーを祭っている寺院に遭遇したことがないのでそう勘違いしたのでしょう。 :--[[User:Setu|Setu]] 19:56 2003年7月3日 (UTC) Peehyoro Acalaでございます。
ふむむむ、ブラーフマナが、もともと形容詞というのが問題みたいですね。 もともと「ブラフマンに属する階級」、「ブラフマンに属する祭儀書」だったのが、 「階級」「祭儀書」の方を省略して呼んでいるうちに紛らわしくなったと（笑）。
もしかしたら、お知り合いのインド人さんの仰るカーストのブラフマンや人名のブラフマンも、 案外、正式な形の何かが脱落した口語形なのかもしれません。[[User:Peehyoro Acala|Peehyoro Acala]] 10:03 2003年7月5日 (UTC) == [[ブラフミン]]との統合について == ブラフミンは英語からのカタカナ表記、バラモンは梵語の音写のカタカナ表記のようです。日本語としての歴史はバラモンの方が長いようなので、バラモンに統合したいところですがいかがでしょうか。[[User:Ligar|Ligar]] 2005年1月7日 (金) 00:57 (UTC) :特にご意見がなかったので、統合せず、しばらくはこのままの状態でおきたいと思います。[[User:Ligar|Ligar]] 2005年1月22日 (土) 05:05 (UTC) **（賛成）統合に賛成します。（--12/2,220.99.231.195） ***（対処）統合してみました。適宜修正して下さい。--[[User:Kstigarbha|Kstigarbha]] 2005年12月5日 (月) 11:07 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1313143275 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{Skip to talk}} {{Contentious topics/talk notice|topic=ipa}} {{Talk page header}} {{Old prod|nom=Ankush 89|nomdate=10 April 2015|nomreason=This article does not meet Wikipedia Quality Standards and is just favoured and biased as an attempt to promote the fame of this caste|con=Gene93k|condate=10 April 2015|conreason=Deletion is too controversial for PROD. Requires discussion at AfD.}} {{Old peer review|archive=1}} {{WikiProject banner shell|class=B|vital=yes|1= {{WikiProject India|importance=High|assess-date=September 2024}} {{WikiProject Hinduism|importance = Top}} {{WikiProject Indian caste system|importance=Top}} {{WikiProject Sociology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Ethnic groups|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Guild of Copy Editors|user=Jack Greenmaven |date=May 10, 2012 }} }} {{Expert-talk}} {{User:MiszaBot/config |archiveheader = {{aan}} |maxarchivesize = 100K |counter = 4 |minthreadsleft = 3 |algo = old(90d) |archive = Talk:Brahmin/Archive %(counter)d }} == Genetic heredity == The article as it stands reads as if there is no basis to the brahmins as an endogamous caste group, which is clearly nonsense. All genetic analyses show that brahmins show significantly more proximity to each other than to regional and other caste groups. The article ought to be revised to reflect this point. If a Tamil brahmin is closer to a Punjabi brahmin than a Punjabi brahmin is to a Punjabi khatri, then this clearly shows that brahmins are a genetic endogamous group and that the history of India reflects that brahmins had a hereditary status and were held separate from people who merely learned or practised some portion of a religious praxis, or held allegiance to a religious corpus. Indeed, genetic tests connnect brahmins together and give the lie to the claim that being a brahmin was merely a vocational choice within the framework of Indian culture. The article is misleading and seems to imply that there is no such thing as an inherited brahmin caste genetic heritage, when this is demonstrably false. [[User:Zubedar|Zubedar]] ([[User talk:Zubedar|talk]]) 00:44, 21 July 2024 (UTC) :Please note that we don't mention genetics in caste articles as per [[WP:CONSENSUS]]! [[User:Ekdalian|Ekdalian]] ([[User talk:Ekdalian|talk]]) 05:51, 21 July 2024 (UTC) :This is something I second. And this is seen clearly in major papers like Narasimhan et al 2019. :There is shared culture between Brahmins too. :People don't seem to fully understand the fact that "ethnic identity" in India is a blend of various factors and not solely dependent on the langauge you speak; as people/groups migrated throughout history and picked up some local customs/tongues while retaining their original culture. :This current article has been presented in a way it is reducing the cultural, communal and overall sense of identity of Brahmins to just a "caste". We don't see this being done for other groups for example on articles about Jat, Khatri, Gurjar so I don't see why the same is applied for Brahmins, when Brahmins have clear cut genealogies, scriptural records and historic recounts connecting and mentioning Brahmins as a group with common origins and cultural descent. [[User:Temporary 1010|Temporary 1010]] ([[User talk:Temporary 1010|talk]]) 15:07, 21 January 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 15 October 2024 == {{edit extended-protected|Brahmin|answered=yes}} Branhminism has been used to oppress people from other caste group. [[Special:Contributions/116.75.98.65|116.75.98.65]] ([[User talk:116.75.98.65|talk]]) 16:48, 15 October 2024 (UTC) :{{Not done}}: please provide [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable sources]] that support the change you want to be made. [[User:Bowler the Carmine|Bowler the Carmine]] | [[User talk:Bowler the Carmine|talk]] 17:45, 15 October 2024 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 24 September 2025 == {{Edit extended-protected|Brahmin|answered=yes}} What we call Brahmins today is not necessarily what they were centuries ago. Ancient texts and power structures may have been rewritten to elevate their image, but in reality, they were often scribes, priests, and functionaries serving under kings—not rulers themselves. Their power came from controlling rituals and knowledge, not from land or armies. The Chola Empire, which valued warriors, administrators, and temple-builders, reportedly turned against certain Brahmin groups who overstepped their role. Conspiracy theorists argue that these Brahmins manipulated religion for personal gain, misusing rituals to sway rulers. When this became obvious, they were chased, punished, or reduced in status, especially in Tamil regions. The later rewriting of history by northern dynasties and colonial powers may have “upgraded” the Brahmin caste to appear like the eternal elite, masking their older role as temple workers, advisors, and accountants for royal families. Some even say the narrative of Brahmin supremacy is the biggest propaganda project of Indian history—a survival tactic after being sidelined by Tamil kings like the Cholas. ⚡ In short: the conspiracy theory is that Brahmins were never true rulers but royal workers whose status was inflated later—and the Cholas, being sharp rulers, saw through their tricks and put them back in their place. [[Special:Contributions/2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2|2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2]] ([[User talk:2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2|talk]]) 10:50, 24 September 2025 (UTC) :{{not done}}''':''' this is an AI-generated conspiracy theory. [[User:NotAGenious|NotAGenious]] ([[User talk:NotAGenious|talk]]) 13:30, 24 September 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Simple English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4412200 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) Hello bro's, who ever created this page "The Brahmins developed in the Aryan society by how powerful the people in this caste were." can u justify this statement by any realtime example. For Eg: does any Brahmin ever had goen in military or scarified his life for any one ha?.you people just go to teacher, doctor, scholar, or religious person. The how come this happen ha?. And "The Brahmins' society grew into the Aryan society around 1600 BC." can you give any proof for this statement and what is base that u are writting this with out any knowledge ha? And "Brahmins eat fish but they do not eat any other meat", eating fish itself is an non-veg and you are telling that you are veg ha?. do you the real meaning of Veg, the people who only eat the food that we get from Earth. And you are all eating Dairy products which made from milk, fishs and you are telling yourself as a Veg, just think ok... So can please edit that contents or should show any proof which show that is wrong ha?.. [[User:Nadarsatishkumar|GentalMan]] ([[User talk:Nadarsatishkumar|talk]]) 06:58, 16 May 2013 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Monkbot]], [[User:Immanuelle]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Brahmin here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/3773170 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) Peehyoro Acalaと申します。
え、私の聞いた話だと、婆羅門(バラモン)は、 ブラーフマナ (ब्राह्मण)の音写 とのことなんですが....。
ブラーフマナは、ブラフマンの派生形容詞転じて名詞で「ブラフマンに属する(階級)」 という意味。ブラフマンそのものではないそうです。
で、「ブラフミン」というのも、私は聞いた事が無いんですが、 どういう素性の言葉なんでしょうか？ 原綴とか示して頂けると、少しは調べられるかもしれないんですが....。[[User:Peehyoro Acala|Peehyoro Acala]] 15:16 2003年7月3日 (UTC) *ありがとう。バラモンは司祭カーストの意味だと言うことですね? 根本原理のブラフマンの意味は記事から消します。 :ブラフミンの発音(つづり)の由来は知りません。[http://www.google.com/search?num=100&hl=ja&ie=UTF-8&oe=UTF-8&as_qdr=all&q=%E3%82%AB%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88+%E3%83%96%E3%83%A9%E3%83%95%E3%83%9F%E3%83%B3&btnG=Google+%E6%A4%9C%E7%B4%A2&lr= グーグル検索(カースト ブラフミン)]、[http://www.google.com/search?num=100&hl=ja&ie=UTF-8&oe=UTF-8&as_qdr=all&q=brahmin+caste&btnG=Google+%E6%A4%9C%E7%B4%A2&lr= グーグル検索(brahmin caste)]と言うことで使われているというのは間違いないです。 :ブラフミンは、ブラフマンとも、ブラーフマナとも言うのは知っていました。ただ、ブラーフマナは書物でヴェーダの一部の祭儀書でもあり、ブラフマンは根本原理の意味もあるので意味が重複してしまいます。それで、ブラフミンを使うと意味が重複しなくて便利だなあと思います。 :ただ、知合いのインド人は「ブラフマン」とカーストの名前を呼んでいるようです。近くの野菜屋さんの家族はブラフマンです。おかげでしばらく、ブラフマーが根本原理の呼び名かと勘違いしてました。必然的に、人格神ブラフマーが別に存在しているのは忘れていました。実際に人格神ブラフマーを祭っている寺院に遭遇したことがないのでそう勘違いしたのでしょう。 :--[[User:Setu|Setu]] 19:56 2003年7月3日 (UTC) Peehyoro Acalaでございます。
ふむむむ、ブラーフマナが、もともと形容詞というのが問題みたいですね。 もともと「ブラフマンに属する階級」、「ブラフマンに属する祭儀書」だったのが、 「階級」「祭儀書」の方を省略して呼んでいるうちに紛らわしくなったと（笑）。
もしかしたら、お知り合いのインド人さんの仰るカーストのブラフマンや人名のブラフマンも、 案外、正式な形の何かが脱落した口語形なのかもしれません。[[User:Peehyoro Acala|Peehyoro Acala]] 10:03 2003年7月5日 (UTC) == [[ブラフミン]]との統合について == ブラフミンは英語からのカタカナ表記、バラモンは梵語の音写のカタカナ表記のようです。日本語としての歴史はバラモンの方が長いようなので、バラモンに統合したいところですがいかがでしょうか。[[User:Ligar|Ligar]] 2005年1月7日 (金) 00:57 (UTC) :特にご意見がなかったので、統合せず、しばらくはこのままの状態でおきたいと思います。[[User:Ligar|Ligar]] 2005年1月22日 (土) 05:05 (UTC) **（賛成）統合に賛成します。（--12/2,220.99.231.195） ***（対処）統合してみました。適宜修正して下さい。--[[User:Kstigarbha|Kstigarbha]] 2005年12月5日 (月) 11:07 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1313143275 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{Skip to talk}} {{Contentious topics/talk notice|topic=ipa}} {{Talk page header}} {{Old prod|nom=Ankush 89|nomdate=10 April 2015|nomreason=This article does not meet Wikipedia Quality Standards and is just favoured and biased as an attempt to promote the fame of this caste|con=Gene93k|condate=10 April 2015|conreason=Deletion is too controversial for PROD. Requires discussion at AfD.}} {{Old peer review|archive=1}} {{WikiProject banner shell|class=B|vital=yes|1= {{WikiProject India|importance=High|assess-date=September 2024}} {{WikiProject Hinduism|importance = Top}} {{WikiProject Indian caste system|importance=Top}} {{WikiProject Sociology|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Ethnic groups|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Guild of Copy Editors|user=Jack Greenmaven |date=May 10, 2012 }} }} {{Expert-talk}} {{User:MiszaBot/config |archiveheader = {{aan}} |maxarchivesize = 100K |counter = 4 |minthreadsleft = 3 |algo = old(90d) |archive = Talk:Brahmin/Archive %(counter)d }} == Genetic heredity == The article as it stands reads as if there is no basis to the brahmins as an endogamous caste group, which is clearly nonsense. All genetic analyses show that brahmins show significantly more proximity to each other than to regional and other caste groups. The article ought to be revised to reflect this point. If a Tamil brahmin is closer to a Punjabi brahmin than a Punjabi brahmin is to a Punjabi khatri, then this clearly shows that brahmins are a genetic endogamous group and that the history of India reflects that brahmins had a hereditary status and were held separate from people who merely learned or practised some portion of a religious praxis, or held allegiance to a religious corpus. Indeed, genetic tests connnect brahmins together and give the lie to the claim that being a brahmin was merely a vocational choice within the framework of Indian culture. The article is misleading and seems to imply that there is no such thing as an inherited brahmin caste genetic heritage, when this is demonstrably false. [[User:Zubedar|Zubedar]] ([[User talk:Zubedar|talk]]) 00:44, 21 July 2024 (UTC) :Please note that we don't mention genetics in caste articles as per [[WP:CONSENSUS]]! [[User:Ekdalian|Ekdalian]] ([[User talk:Ekdalian|talk]]) 05:51, 21 July 2024 (UTC) :This is something I second. And this is seen clearly in major papers like Narasimhan et al 2019. :There is shared culture between Brahmins too. :People don't seem to fully understand the fact that "ethnic identity" in India is a blend of various factors and not solely dependent on the langauge you speak; as people/groups migrated throughout history and picked up some local customs/tongues while retaining their original culture. :This current article has been presented in a way it is reducing the cultural, communal and overall sense of identity of Brahmins to just a "caste". We don't see this being done for other groups for example on articles about Jat, Khatri, Gurjar so I don't see why the same is applied for Brahmins, when Brahmins have clear cut genealogies, scriptural records and historic recounts connecting and mentioning Brahmins as a group with common origins and cultural descent. [[User:Temporary 1010|Temporary 1010]] ([[User talk:Temporary 1010|talk]]) 15:07, 21 January 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 15 October 2024 == {{edit extended-protected|Brahmin|answered=yes}} Branhminism has been used to oppress people from other caste group. [[Special:Contributions/116.75.98.65|116.75.98.65]] ([[User talk:116.75.98.65|talk]]) 16:48, 15 October 2024 (UTC) :{{Not done}}: please provide [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable sources]] that support the change you want to be made. [[User:Bowler the Carmine|Bowler the Carmine]] | [[User talk:Bowler the Carmine|talk]] 17:45, 15 October 2024 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 24 September 2025 == {{Edit extended-protected|Brahmin|answered=yes}} What we call Brahmins today is not necessarily what they were centuries ago. Ancient texts and power structures may have been rewritten to elevate their image, but in reality, they were often scribes, priests, and functionaries serving under kings—not rulers themselves. Their power came from controlling rituals and knowledge, not from land or armies. The Chola Empire, which valued warriors, administrators, and temple-builders, reportedly turned against certain Brahmin groups who overstepped their role. Conspiracy theorists argue that these Brahmins manipulated religion for personal gain, misusing rituals to sway rulers. When this became obvious, they were chased, punished, or reduced in status, especially in Tamil regions. The later rewriting of history by northern dynasties and colonial powers may have “upgraded” the Brahmin caste to appear like the eternal elite, masking their older role as temple workers, advisors, and accountants for royal families. Some even say the narrative of Brahmin supremacy is the biggest propaganda project of Indian history—a survival tactic after being sidelined by Tamil kings like the Cholas. ⚡ In short: the conspiracy theory is that Brahmins were never true rulers but royal workers whose status was inflated later—and the Cholas, being sharp rulers, saw through their tricks and put them back in their place. [[Special:Contributions/2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2|2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2]] ([[User talk:2402:D000:A400:6571:80F7:DB1E:C61:CCC2|talk]]) 10:50, 24 September 2025 (UTC) :{{not done}}''':''' this is an AI-generated conspiracy theory. [[User:NotAGenious|NotAGenious]] ([[User talk:NotAGenious|talk]]) 13:30, 24 September 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Simple English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4412200 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) Hello bro's, who ever created this page "The Brahmins developed in the Aryan society by how powerful the people in this caste were." can u justify this statement by any realtime example. For Eg: does any Brahmin ever had goen in military or scarified his life for any one ha?.you people just go to teacher, doctor, scholar, or religious person. The how come this happen ha?. And "The Brahmins' society grew into the Aryan society around 1600 BC." can you give any proof for this statement and what is base that u are writting this with out any knowledge ha? And "Brahmins eat fish but they do not eat any other meat", eating fish itself is an non-veg and you are telling that you are veg ha?. do you the real meaning of Veg, the people who only eat the food that we get from Earth. And you are all eating Dairy products which made from milk, fishs and you are telling yourself as a Veg, just think ok... So can please edit that contents or should show any proof which show that is wrong ha?.. [[User:Nadarsatishkumar|GentalMan]] ([[User talk:Nadarsatishkumar|talk]]) 06:58, 16 May 2013 (UTC)
